raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against multiple prior works (Liu et al., 2016; Clark et al., 2021) and clearly articulates the delta, especially in addressing the 'AI-tell' prior.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags the stale Liu et al. (2016) citation, and suggests newer meta-analyses. It also provides precise bibliographic details for Brown et al. (2020).",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, including the model version, CI calculations, and test assumptions, providing clear reasoning for each.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all key problems in the original text and providing a well-structured revision.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues with the calibration examples instilling a new prior.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including detailed explanations for the anachronism, overclaimed conclusions, and methodological concerns."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against multiple prior works (Liu et al., 2016; Clark et al., 2021) and clearly articulates the delta, especially in addressing the 'AI-tell' prior.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags the stale Liu et al. (2016) citation, and suggests newer meta-analyses. It also provides precise bibliographic details for Brown et al. (2020).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, including the model version, CI calculations, and test assumptions, providing clear reasoning for each.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all key problems in the original text and providing a well-structured revision.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues with the calibration examples instilling a new prior.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including detailed explanations for the anachronism, overclaimed conclusions, and methodological concerns.
